title: Endless Euphoria
description: A vanilla+ modpack that keeps the feel of minecraft but adds a lot of spice!
body:
![Endless Euphoria for Fabric 1.21.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4433f8669546d9d616db0246a9ee5fb3fad69d1.png)
A Vanilla+ Experience that keeps you hooked for days!


## Features:
3d skin layers, to make your minecraft skin feel more adjacent to the world, instead of having floating pixels.
### Reworked world generation
With mods like Biomes O' Plenty and Tectonic, overworld generation has never looked this good, plus a bunch of dimensional world generation changes! (more biomes and mob spawns!)
### Strange and Medieval Structures
Since vanilla minecraft's structures often get boring quickly, there's a multitude of mods that add a lot of structures! Such as "Medieval ## Buildings" and "When Dungeons Arise"
### Backpacks: Because you can never have enough storage!
### Immersive Portals
This mod was a no-brainer, being able to see the other end of a portal is always mind blowing!
### And much, much more!
